## Task Description
Import a font from Google Fonts (https://fonts.google.com) and apply it to the page.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Google Font imported in HTML or CSS
- [ ] Font applied to at least one element
- [ ] Pushed via Pull Request

Part 2 - CSS / Fonts
